title: Auto-remediacion CPU alta - {{ambiente}}
description: Placeholders a reemplazar antes de importar: ${TU_MZ_ID}, ${TU_WEBHOOK_SLACK}, ${TU_CREDENCIAL_VAULT_ID}, {{ambiente}}.

input.query: timeseries avg_cpu = avg(dt.host.cpu.usage), filter: { managementZones contains "${TU_MZ_ID}" }

input.body: Alerta de CPU en entorno {{ambiente}}: revisar hosts afectados.
